title: Gravel Calculator - Estimate Gravel Needed
description: Free gravel calculator. Calculate how much gravel you need in tons and cubic yards for driveways, paths, and landscaping projects.
keywords: gravel calculator, how much gravel do I need, gravel estimator, cubic yards gravel, gravel cost
intro: Calculate how much gravel you need. Enter the area dimensions and desired depth to get volume in cubic yards and weight in tons.

faq.q: How much gravel do I need?
faq.a: Calculate: Length × Width × Depth (all in feet) / 27 = cubic yards. Multiply by 1.4 for approximate tons. A 10×20 ft area at 2" deep needs about 1.04 cubic yards (1.45 tons).

faq.q: How much does a cubic yard of gravel weigh?
faq.a: Approximately 2,800 lbs (1.4 tons). This varies by gravel type: pea gravel ≈ 1.4 tons/yd³, crushed stone ≈ 1.5 tons/yd³.
